name: URAANKHIANS Dygyn - The Beginning
short_description: URAANHAI! Finally, we have all together driven Alaa-Mogus into the underworld! Now let's have a real Ysyakh and celebrate! Let's organize the first "DYGYNA" game and find out who is the fastest! Play in multiplayer and become the FIRST!
detailed_description:
There are rumors that the first "DYGYN" games were organized by the great Tygyn Darkhan himself, after the URAANHAI drove Alaa-Mogus into the underworld! In ancient times, the first "DYGYN" games featured the strongest warriors of the URAANHAI. And among them was YOU! Friends, are you ready to compete with the mightiest URAANHAI?

  • Yakut voiceover

  • New funny memes, like in "URANHAIDAR vs. ALAA-MOGUS"

  • Play in multiplayer and compete with your friends in the first DYGHYNA games!

  • We now have a chance to see how our ancestors played firsthand

  • Authentic Yakut assets

  • Immerse yourself in a true YAKUT SUMMER. Mmm... the fresh scent of the forest...

  • Compete against various people or your FRIENDS and don’t let them overtake you!

So, are you ready, URANHAI? Then let's go!

The goal of the game is to jump, dodge, run, overcome obstacles, and try to reach the finish line first!
